LanguageData.VRecyclingE_AlloypackSplitter.descriptio: A spacertech device that separates stabilized alloypacks into steel, plasteel and gold compounds. This process takes a long time and requires a lot of power.\n\nConsider that the building will need free space behind it to produce its output!
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_AlloypackSplitter.label: alloypack splitter
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ElectricRecyclingWorkbench.d: A workbench with automated sorters and electric tools, used in recycling wastepacks into other resources. Can work without electricity at 50% of normal speed.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_GarbageCompactor.description: An industrial-tech device that condenses trash using hydraulic press into trashbricks. While it does not neutralize the trash completely, it allows for a creation of a construction resource out of it. The process requires considerable amounts of power and emits tox gas during operation.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_GarbageCompactor.label: garbage compactor
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_RecyclingWorkbench.descripti: A workbench for recycling wastepacks into other resources. Works at 50% of the speed of an electric recycling workbench.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_RecyclingWorkbench.label: recycling bench
